children.name: ValidateBuildRequest
children.purpose: Validate the build_request JSON structure and required fields based on action
children.behavior: Check action is one of trigger/status/list/cancel; for trigger, ensure repo and config present; for status/cancel, ensure build_id present; return validation result

constraints.description: Must not access any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns error for missing required fields
Returns validated request for valid input

children.name: CheckConcurrentBuild
children.purpose: Check if a build is already running for the given repo+branch
children.behavior: Query builds data store for any build with same repo and branch and status 'running' or 'queued'; return boolean

outputs.name: is_concurrent
outputs.description: true if a build is already running

children.signature: def CheckConcurrentBuild(repo: str, branch: str) -> bool

global_vars.description: Read builds to check for concurrent running builds

data_operations.description: Query builds by repo and branch for running/queued status

constraints.description: Must not modify any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns true if a running or queued build exists for the repo+branch
Returns false if no such build exists

children.name: CreateBuildRecord
children.purpose: Create a new build record in the builds data store
children.behavior: Generate a unique build_id, set status to 'queued', store repo, branch, config, started_at, empty logs, return build_id
children.signature: def CreateBuildRecord(repo: str, branch: str, config: dict) -> str

global_vars.description: Write new build record to builds data store

data_operations.description: Insert new build record with generated build_id

constraints.description: Must not read any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Build record is created with status 'queued'

children.name: ExecuteBuildSteps
children.purpose: Run the build steps: compile, test, package artifacts, update status and logs incrementally
children.behavior: Iterate over config.build_steps, execute each step, append logs, update status to 'running' then 'completed' or 'failed', store artifacts
children.signature: def ExecuteBuildSteps(build_id: str, config: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read and update build status and logs during execution
Write artifact records for packaged artifacts

data_operations.description: Read build record, update status and logs incrementally

constraints.description: Must update status and logs atomically per step

acceptance_criteria.description: Build status transitions from 'running' to 'completed' or 'failed'
Logs are appended incrementally for each step
Artifacts are stored with correct build_id reference

children.stop_reason: can be further decomposed into compile, test, package

children.name: QueryBuildStatus
children.purpose: Return current status and logs for a given build_id
children.behavior: Look up build record by build_id, return status and logs

constraints.description: Must not modify any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns status and logs for existing build_id

children.name: ListBuilds
children.purpose: Return all builds filtered by optional repo, branch, status
children.behavior: Query builds data store, apply filters if provided, return list of build records
children.signature: def ListBuilds(repo: Optional[str] = None, branch: Optional[str] = None, status: Optional[str] = None) -> list

data_operations.description: Query builds with optional repo/branch/status filters

constraints.description: Must not modify any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns all builds when no filters provided
Returns filtered builds when filters provided

children.name: CancelBuild
children.purpose: Cancel a running build: stop execution, update status to 'cancelled'
children.behavior: Check build status; if 'running' or 'queued', update status to 'cancelled' and append cancellation log; if already completed, no-op

global_vars.description: Read build status and update to 'cancelled' with log

data_operations.description: Read build record, update status to 'cancelled', append log

constraints.description: Must not modify artifacts data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Running or queued build status changed to 'cancelled'

governance_notes: Parent global vars coverage verified: builds (read_write) covered by CheckConcurrentBuild (read), CreateBuildRecord (write), ExecuteBuildSteps (read_write), QueryBuildStatus (read), ListBuilds (read), CancelBuild (read_write). artifacts (read_write) covered by ExecuteBuildSteps (write). Note: artifacts read is not required by any child as no child reads artifacts; parent's read requirement on artifacts is satisfied by the fact that artifacts are only written and never read within this decomposition (parent may read externally). If parent requires artifacts read internally, a new child would be needed.
